title: Tenses Through Festivals — Level 2
tagline: More challenging verbs and festival contexts for growing grammar skills.
description: Children practise using past, present and future forms with more complex actions, irregular verbs and multi-step festival situations. The flip-and-check format provides immediate language guidance after every attempt.
benefits: Strengthens tense usage through meaningful sentence practice
Introduces more complex and irregular verb forms
Builds grammar confidence through culturally familiar situations

comparison.format: Double-sided laminated cards with rounded corners

themesIncluded: Past, present and future tenses, Indian festivals, irregular and multi-step verbs, rituals, traditions and expressions of devotion.
